prose: **Oxygen HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fitted) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 3 (triplet). SCF converged in 7 cycles; integrity = ok. **HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.2880586 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, frontier-orbital energy difference). HOMO = −8.8740 eV, LUMO = −3.5859 eV.
